put.description: Updates the fulfilment fields of a wanted video entry for the currently authenticated user. Set IsFulfilled to true to mark as fulfilled, or false to reset it.

delete.description: Removes the specified video from the wanted list of the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the video was not on the user's wanted list. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Adds the specified video to the wanted list for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already on the wanted list. Returns 404 if the video does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of wanted videos for the currently authenticated user. Supports filtering by fulfilment status, site, actor, search term, and recency. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Adds up to 50 videos to the wanted list for the currently authenticated user in a single request. Videos already on the wanted list are silently skipped. Unknown video IDs are silently omitted. Returns counts of added, already-existed, and not-found entries. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged list of videos. Supports filtering by site ID and searching by video title or site title. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Returns full details for up to 50 videos by their IDs. IDs that do not exist are silently omitted from the response. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns full details for a single video, including site, network, images, alternative titles, and actors with their images. Requires API key authentication.
Returns a paged list of sites ordered by title ascending. Supports filtering by search term matched against site title. Requires API key authentication.
Returns the current rate limit counter for the authenticated user, including requests used, remaining, and seconds until the oldest request expires from the sliding window.

Returns prenames grouped by video. 'q' (min 3 characters) is required unless 'releaseDate' is provided, in which case 'q' is optional. Each group includes Video.Id, Video.Title, Site.Id, and Site.Title. Capped at 500 video groups, no paging.
Returns a paged list of prenames ordered by creation date descending. Supports filtering by site ID and creation date range. Requires API key authentication.
Returns the current API status and server timestamp. No authentication required.

delete.description: Unmarks the specified site as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the site was not in the user's favourites. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Marks the specified site as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already a favourite. Returns 404 if the site does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of sites the currently authenticated user has favorited. Supports filtering by search term. Requires API key authentication.

delete.description: Unmarks the specified actor as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 404 if the actor was not in the user's favourites. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Marks the specified actor as a favourite for the currently authenticated user. Returns 204 if added or already a favourite. Returns 404 if the actor does not exist. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns a paged, sortable list of actors the currently authenticated user has favorited. Supports filtering by search term. Requires API key authentication.
Returns a paged list of actors. Supports free-text search by name or alias, and sorting by name or creation date. Default page size is 100, maximum is 500. Requires API key authentication.

post.description: Returns full details for up to 50 actors by their IDs. IDs that do not exist are silently omitted from the response. Requires API key authentication.

get.description: Returns full details for a single actor including all attributes, images, aliases, external links, and bios. Requires API key authentication.
